Label: UX Validation Complete (Level 1)
GO Definition: Validation plan executed: internal product user sessions (3-5), external representative user sessions (5-8), and customer sessions completed with findings documented and applied
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Validation partially complete; mitigation plan documented with timeline
NO GO Definition: Required validation (internal + external + customer sessions) has not been performed

Label: UX Validation Complete (Level 2)
GO Definition: Validation plan executed: internal product user sessions (3-5) and external representative user sessions (5-8) completed with findings documented and applied; no customer sessions required
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Validation partially complete; mitigation plan documented with timeline
NO GO Definition: Required validation (internal + external) has not been performed

Label: UX Validation Complete (Level 3)
GO Definition: Validation plan executed: internal product user sessions (3-5) completed with findings documented and applied
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Validation partially complete; mitigation plan documented with timeline
NO GO Definition: Required internal validation has not been performed

Label: UX Preview Validated (Level 1)
GO Definition: UX and Product Education have reviewed changes in UX Preview production group; both signed off on visual accuracy, interaction quality, and documentation needs
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Preview available but one or more sign-offs still pending; issues identified with clear resolution plan
NO GO Definition: No UX Preview group configured or reviews not started

Label: UX Preview Validated (Level 2)
GO Definition: UX and Product Education have reviewed changes in UX Preview production group; both signed off on visual accuracy, interaction quality, and documentation needs
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Preview available but one or more sign-offs still pending; issues identified with clear resolution plan
NO GO Definition: No UX Preview group configured or reviews not started

Label: UX Preview Validated (Level 3)
GO Definition: UX and Product Education have reviewed changes in UX Preview production group; both signed off on visual accuracy, interaction quality, and documentation needs
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Preview available but one or more sign-offs still pending; issues identified with clear resolution plan
NO GO Definition: No UX Preview group configured or reviews not started

Label: Behavioral Baseline Established (Level 1)
GO Definition: Baseline Pendo/usage metrics captured for all affected workflows; pre-launch snapshot documented with defined comparison criteria for post-launch analysis
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Baseline partially captured; workaround plan documented
NO GO Definition: No behavioral baseline established for affected workflows

Label: Behavioral Baseline Established (Level 2)
GO Definition: Baseline Pendo/usage metrics captured for all affected workflows; pre-launch snapshot documented with defined comparison criteria for post-launch analysis
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Baseline partially captured; workaround plan documented
NO GO Definition: No behavioral baseline established for affected workflows

Label: Behavioral Baseline Established (Level 3)
GO Definition: Baseline Pendo/usage metrics captured for all affected workflows; pre-launch snapshot documented with defined comparison criteria for post-launch analysis
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Baseline partially captured; workaround plan documented
NO GO Definition: No behavioral baseline established for affected workflows

Label: Feature Gate Readiness (Level 1)
GO Definition: Feature gate required: implemented and tested; rollback verified in staging with <30 minute recovery time; gate controls validated for all cohort groups (Internal, Cohort 1, Cohort 2)
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Feature gate implemented but rollback procedure not yet tested end-to-end; gate configuration documented
NO GO Definition: No feature gate implemented or validated

Label: Feature Gate Readiness (Level 2)
GO Definition: Feature gate required: implemented and tested; rollback verified in staging with <30 minute recovery time; gate controls validated for all cohort groups (Internal, Cohort 1, Cohort 2)
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Feature gate implemented but rollback procedure not yet tested end-to-end; gate configuration documented
NO GO Definition: No feature gate implemented or validated

Label: Feature Gate Readiness (Level 3)
GO Definition: Feature gate recommended (optional): if used, implemented and tested; rollback verified; gate controls validated for cohort groups
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Feature gate implemented but rollback procedure not yet tested end-to-end
NO GO Definition: No feature gate for a Level 3 change (optional)

Label: Rollback Plan Ready (Level 1)
GO Definition: Rollback plan documented and tested: detection (<15 min), assessment (confirm rollout-related), feature gate disable (<30 min), stakeholder communication (<1 hour); communication template prepared
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Rollback plan documented but not yet tested end-to-end; stakeholder communication template in draft
NO GO Definition: No rollback plan exists or rollback mechanism has not been identified

Label: Rollback Plan Ready (Level 2)
GO Definition: Rollback plan documented and tested: detection (<15 min), assessment (confirm rollout-related), feature gate disable (<30 min), stakeholder communication (<1 hour); communication template prepared
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Rollback plan documented but not yet tested end-to-end; stakeholder communication template in draft
NO GO Definition: No rollback plan exists or rollback mechanism has not been identified

Label: Rollback Plan Ready (Level 3)
GO Definition: Rollback plan documented and tested: detection (<15 min), assessment (confirm rollout-related), feature gate disable (<30 min), stakeholder communication (<1 hour); communication template prepared
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Rollback plan documented but not yet tested end-to-end; stakeholder communication template in draft
NO GO Definition: No rollback plan exists or rollback mechanism has not been identified

Label: In-App Education Deployed (Level 1)
GO Definition: Full onboarding (Pendo) and KB/help updates (Zendesk) deployed; owned by Product Education; accessibility reviewed; Pendo linked to Zendesk articles
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Pendo and/or Zendesk/KB drafted and in review but not yet deployed; or accessibility review pending
NO GO Definition: Required full onboarding or help/KB not created or fail accessibility or plain-language review

Label: In-App Education Deployed (Level 2)
GO Definition: Guided walkthroughs (Pendo) and KB/help updates (Zendesk) deployed; owned by Product Education; accessibility reviewed; Pendo linked to Zendesk articles
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Pendo and/or Zendesk/KB drafted and in review but not yet deployed; or accessibility review pending
NO GO Definition: Required guided walkthroughs or help/KB not created or fail accessibility or plain-language review

Label: In-App Education Deployed (Level 3)
GO Definition: Contextual guidance (Pendo) and KB/help updates (Zendesk) where applicable; owned by Product Education; accessibility reviewed; Pendo linked to Zendesk articles
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Pendo and/or Zendesk/KB drafted and in review but not yet deployed; or accessibility review pending
NO GO Definition: Required contextual guidance or help/KB not created or fail accessibility or plain-language review

Label: Internal CS notification complete (Level 1)
GO Definition: PM coordinates: Slack notification to CS sent; Product Education (KB) and CS/Support (FAQ, support training, customer email draft) have completed CS Prep tasks. CS notified 18+ weeks before Cohort 1; materials available before Cohort 1.
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Notification sent but FAQ or KB still in progress; CS acknowledged with clear timeline
NO GO Definition: CS not notified 18+ weeks before Cohort 1; or Slack/FAQ/KB/training/draft not available for CS

Label: Internal CS notification complete (Level 2)
GO Definition: PM coordinates: Slack notification to CS sent; Product Education (KB) and CS/Support (FAQ, support training, customer email draft) have completed CS Prep tasks. CS notified at least 2-4 weeks before Cohort 1; materials so CS can send advance email 2-4 weeks before.
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Notification sent but FAQ or KB still in progress; CS acknowledged with clear timeline
NO GO Definition: CS not notified 2-4 weeks before Cohort 1; or Slack/FAQ/KB/training/draft not available for CS

Label: Internal CS notification complete (Level 3)
GO Definition: PM coordinates: Slack notification to CS sent; Product Education (KB) and CS/Support (FAQ, KB) have completed CS Prep tasks. CS notified before Cohort 1 within 3-6 week rollout so CS can decide on customer notification.
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Notification sent but FAQ or KB still in progress; CS acknowledged with clear timeline
NO GO Definition: CS not notified before Cohort 1; or Slack/FAQ/KB not available for CS

Label: Customer notification by CS executed (Level 1)
GO Definition: Marketing executes the advance email plan; CSM owns this criterion and strategic outreach. All required customer communications sent: 18+ weeks advance email and CSM outreach per plan.
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Customer communications on track with minor delays and catch-up plan
NO GO Definition: Required 18+ weeks advance email and CSM outreach not sent

Label: Customer notification by CS executed (Level 2)
GO Definition: Marketing executes the advance email plan; CSM owns this criterion and strategic outreach. All required customer communications sent: advance email 2-4 weeks before.
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Customer communications on track with minor delays and catch-up plan
NO GO Definition: Required 2-4 weeks advance email not sent

Label: Customer notification by CS executed (Level 3)
GO Definition: Marketing executes the advance email plan; CSM owns this criterion and strategic outreach. KB article updates upon release; CS has notified customers where appropriate or documented that no customer notification was needed.
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Customer notification decision documented and in progress
NO GO Definition: KB not updated and CS customer notification not addressed
